'''rakocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ohnologue|ohnologue]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ohnologue|ohnologue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rakocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rækecheth|rækecheth]] || [[word:rækechej|rækechej]] || [[word:rækechesh|rækechesh]] || [[word:rækeche|rækeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rakokochoth|rakokochoth]] || [[word:rakokochoj|rakokochoj]] || [[word:rakokochosh|rakokochosh]] || [[word:rakokocho|rakokocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rakochoth|rakochoth]] || [[word:rakochoj|rakochoj]] || [[word:rakochosh|rakochosh]] || [[word:rakocho|rakocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rakofchoth|rakofchoth]] || [[word:rakofchoj|rakofchoj]] || [[word:rakofchosh|rakofchosh]] || [[word:rakofchof|rakofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rakochotho|rakochotho]] || [[word:rakochojo|rakochojo]] || [[word:rakochosho|rakochosho]] || [[word:rakochoko|rakochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rakochoth|rakochoth]] || [[word:rakochoj|rakochoj]] || [[word:rakochosh|rakochosh]] || [[word:rakocho|rakocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rakochothol|rakochothol]] || [[word:rakochojol|rakochojol]] || [[word:rakochoshol|rakochoshol]] || [[word:rakochokol|rakochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rakochothotho|rakochothotho]] || [[word:rakochojojo|rakochojojo]] || [[word:rakochoshosho|rakochoshosho]] || [[word:rakochoko|rakochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rakochothon|rakochothon]] || [[word:rakochojon|rakochojon]] || [[word:rakochoshon|rakochoshon]] || [[word:rakochokon|rakochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rakochothoro|rakochothoro]] || [[word:rakochojoro|rakochojoro]] || [[word:rakochoshoro|rakochoshoro]] || [[word:rakochokoro|rakochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
